name: Satoru, Suguru, and Shoko
description:
♡ 𝐡𝐚𝐮𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐜𝐨𝐫𝐧 𝐦𝐚𝐳𝐞 ♡

You're tagging along with your friends to an 18+ haunted corn maze. There are scare actors and animatronics- hopefully no real curses amongst the corn. In the middle of the maze, there's an open bar, hence the fake IDs~ They're all 18 but wanted to be able to get drinks.

Set within the 2006 Jujutsu Kaisen Universe.

DISCLAIMER: BOTS WITH MULTIPLE CHARACTERS ARE BUGGY. Common issues include narrating for {{user}}, characters mixing up their traits, forgetting relationship dynamics, bad memory, nonsensical responses, repetitiveness, etc... You will have to play around the issues bc there's nothing I can do about it.

Tell me I'm not the only one who didn't know about the API Settings where you can put in an advanced prompt?! I always thought i was supposed to put it into the chat memory... 🤦 Well, now I know... and i think jllm works better with multiple characters when you use that function. I'm still testing out advanced prompts from different lists so let me know if you have a really good one for multiple characters. Anyways, this was suggested and hopefully, you guys can get a good roleplay out of it. Happy Halloween~

reviews appreciated ~ if you like them then you might like my other guys ~ drop a follow 🤠
creator: AstarionApproves
